description: Returns the object, given object has collision disabled with and whether or not returned object has also collision disabled with given object.
name: collisionDisabledWith

ArraySized.desc: the object, ''obj'' has collision disabled with, or [[objNull]]
ArraySized.name: other

ArraySized.desc: [[true]] if ''other'' has also disabled collision with ''obj'', [[false]] otherwise
ArraySized.name: mutual
